title: TF11 8UP, Royal Airforce Museum: environmental permit application advertisement – EPR/KB3651KV/A001
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on certain applications for Radioactive Substances Activity. The arrangements are explained in their Public Participation Statement  These notices explain:   what the application is about when you need to comment by   The Environment Agency will decide:   whether to grant or refuse the application what conditions to include in the permit (if granted)  "
